title: Ubiquiti EFG - UniFi Enterprise Fortress Gateway
description: Notice: For this product, we provide individual project-based pricing depending on the configuration, scope, and conditions of the project. For more information, please contact your sales representative Ubiquiti UniFi Enterprise Fortress Gateway is a device from the Enterprise series designed for enterprise environments A top-tier UniFi Cloud gateway with a complete set of advanced routing and security features. The UniFi Network software for managing UniFi devices is pre-installed directly on the Cloud Gateway. Access to the Cloud Gateway is available locally through the web interface, via the cloud at unifi.ui.com , or through the UniFi Network mobile app The UniFi Enterprise Fortress Gateway is equipped with two 25G SFP28 , two 10G SFP+ , and two 2.5G RJ-45 ports, ensuring high-speed connectivity. The gateway supports more than 500 UniFi devices and more than 5000 clients . It offers a complete network security solution with advanced threat minimization features, including intrusion detection and prevention systems (IDS/IPS), content filtering, and traffic segmentation based on VLANs. It features a 1.3" touch display showing the current status… Pre-installed UniFi Network app for managing over 500 UniFi devices and more than 5000 clients 18-core ARM v8.2 (2.0 GHz), 16 GB DDR4 RAM Redundant power supply (AC 100â240 V), power adapters included License-free real-time inspection of encrypted packets using NeXT AI Inspection (SSL/TLS decryption) QoS service with UniFi Wi-Fi access points, QoS based on applications, domains, and countries Redundant WAN network with failover…
